creator: marten@zstream.se
text:
The yarn resourcemanager starts but the service start commando ends with the following:

STARTUP_MSG:   build = Unknown -r Unknown; compiled by 'root' on 2021-02-04T19:40Z
STARTUP_MSG:   java = 1.8.0_212
************************************************************/
eval: start_postcmd: not found

line 28 in /usr/local/etc/rc.d/resourcemanager:
start_postcmd="start_postcmd"
